meta.title: Novel begomovirus species of recombinant nature in sweet potato (Ipomoea batatas) and Ipomoea indica: taxonomic and phylogenetic implications

abstractHtml: The GenBank/EMBL/DDBJ accession numbers for the sequences obtained in this study are EU839576[GenBank] , EU839577[GenBank] , EU839578[GenBank] , EF456742[GenBank] , EF456745[GenBank] , EU856365[GenBank] , FJ529203[GenBank] , EF456746[GenBank] , EU839579[GenBank] , EF456741[GenBank] , EF456743[GenBank] , FJ151200.
